ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package (e.g., Classic, Home, Mobile) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Monthly cost of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package features */,
  "trial_period_days" INTEGER /* Number of days for a free trial period */,
  "max_addons" INTEGER /* Maximum number of add-ons allowed for the package */,
  "trial_cost" TEXT /* Cost during the trial period */,
  "renewal_discount" TEXT /* Discount percentage for renewing the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addons" (
  "addon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each add-on */,
  "addon_name" TEXT /* Name of the add-on (e.g., Fall Detection, GPS Tracking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the add-on features */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Monthly fee for the add-on */,
  "is_trialable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the add-on can be used during the trial period */,
  "one_time_fee" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the add-on has a one-time fee */,
  "trial_fee" TEXT /* Fee for the add-on during the trial period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("addon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_addons" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "addon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the add-on */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the add-on is optional for the package */,
  "trial_is_optional" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the add-on is optional during the trial period */,
  "trial_fee" TEXT /* Fee for the add-on during the trial period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id", "addon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, cancelled, expired) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Next renewal date for the subscription */,
  "trial_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial period */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether a discount was applied */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the subscription (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the payment is recurring */,
  "recurring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of recurring payments (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount amount or percentage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the promotion is currently active */,
  "max_uses" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the promotion can be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., support request, device usage) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the interaction */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction resolution (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system user who handled the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., pendant, wristband) */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the device warranty */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service or maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage event */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., fall detection, SOS) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the usage event occurred (if applicable) */,
  "is_emergency" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the usage event was an emergency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer support) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
